configurations.name: Next.js Dev (Turbopack)
runtimeArgs: source ~/.zprofile 2>/dev/null; export PWD=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && cd $PWD && npm run dev

configurations.name: Next.js Start (Production)
runtimeArgs: source ~/.zprofile 2>/dev/null; export PWD=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && cd $PWD && npm run start

configurations.name: Wrangler Preview (Prod)
runtimeArgs: source ~/.zprofile 2>/dev/null; export PWD=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && cd $PWD && npm run preview
